title: Ransomware Precursors Hunt
description: Opinionated ransomware-precursor hunt pack that composes suspicious execution and identity misuse into a pre-impact investigation path.
hypothesis_templates: Suspicious shell execution and anomalous identity activity indicate an operator preparing for lateral movement or encryption impact.
blind_spots: Early precursor activity on unmanaged hosts or identities can still escape this pack even when later stages are visible.
